title: livistona muelleri
intro: Livistona muelleri, also known as the fan palm or cabbage palm, is a species of palm tree native to Australia. It is a fan-leaved palm tree that is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, Livistona muelleri is often made into a tea, tincture, or salve to utilize its medicinal properties.
